docket_entries.description: TRANSACTION ######### NOTICE REGARDING PAYMENT OF SUPPORT REJECTED FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: ITEM 3A. SECTION 4 MISSING CHECK MARK. ADDITIONALLY, ITEM 4B. CHECKED MARKED INCORRECTLY.
